Interface Algorithm<G>

Type Parameters:
G - genotype value type.
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEdaAlgorithm, AdaptiveRatioEdaAlgorithm, BlockCovarianceEdaAlgorithm, BmdaAlgorithm, BoaAlgorithm, CemAlgorithm, CgaAlgorithm, ChowLiuEdaAlgorithm, CmaEsAlgorithm, CopulaEdaAlgorithm, DependencyTreeEdaAlgorithm, EbnaAlgorithm, EhbsaAlgorithm, EhmPermutationEdaAlgorithm, FactorizedDiscreteEdaAlgorithm, FlowEdaAlgorithm, FullCovarianceEdaAlgorithm, GaussianDiagEdaAlgorithm, GmmEdaAlgorithm, HBoaAlgorithm, IgoAlgorithm, IndicatorEdaAlgorithm, KdeEdaAlgorithm, KendallPermutationEdaAlgorithm, LowRankCovarianceEdaAlgorithm, MallowsEdaAlgorithm, MemoryEdaAlgorithm, MimicAlgorithm, MimicContinuousAlgorithm, MoEdaSkeletonAlgorithm, NoisyResamplingEdaAlgorithm, ParetoEdaAlgorithm, PbilAlgorithm, PbilRealAlgorithm, PlackettLuceEdaAlgorithm, PositionBasedPermutationEdaAlgorithm, RandomImmigrantsEdaAlgorithm, RatioBasedEdaAlgorithm, SlidingWindowEdaAlgorithm, SNesAlgorithm, TreeEdaAlgorithm, UmdaAlgorithm, UmdaContinuousAlgorithm, XNesAlgorithm
public interface Algorithm<G>
Lifecycle contract for optimization algorithms.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    id()
    Algorithm identifier (e.g. umda, gaussian-diag-eda, ehm-eda).
    void
    initialize(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Initializes state before iterations start.
    void
    iterate(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Executes one iteration.
    RunResult<G>
    result()
    Returns final result after run completion.
    void
    run(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Runs initialize + iterate loop until stopping condition triggers.
    AlgorithmState<G>
    state()
    Returns current state snapshot.

  • Method Details

    • id

      String id()
      Algorithm identifier (e.g. umda, gaussian-diag-eda, ehm-eda).

    • initialize

      void initialize(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
      Initializes state before iterations start.

    • iterate

      void iterate(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
      Executes one iteration.

    • state

      AlgorithmState<G> state()
      Returns current state snapshot.

    • result

      RunResult<G> result()
      Returns final result after run completion.

    • run

      void run(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
      Runs initialize + iterate loop until stopping condition triggers.
